description: A stylish, fashionable choice from Inc. 5. With it's sleek design this pair looks great with evening and party wear.  The gold details contrast well with the fabric strap and footbed, meaning this sandal will perfectly complement ethnic or Western evening dresses.This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you pack easily when you travel.Heel: 2.5"UpperComfortable textile footbed, ergonomically curved and lightly padded for absolute comfort and styleSynthetic leather patch at heelThong styled straps in synthetic patent leather with slightly elasticated, broad textile strap belowHas a toe separator to hold the foot in place in styleOutsoleDurable outsole with a shaped heel unitReinforced heel cap for heel durabilitySandal careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
